optimal.label: Optimal
optimal.description: Fully tested and verified. All features work. Recommended configuration.

stable.label: Stable
stable.description: Works reliably. Minor edge cases possible. Community tested.

maintenance.label: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Functional but receiving security fixes only. Upgrade recommended.

unstable.label: Unstable
unstable.description: Known issues. Partial functionality. Use at own risk.

broken.label: Broken
broken.description: Known incompatible. Will not function correctly.

unknown.label: Unknown
unknown.description: Untested combination. No compatibility data available.

matrix.notes: Security fixes only. Upgrade to 0.5.x recommended.
No longer supported. Upgrade to 0.5.x required.
BepInEx 6.x (Mono) support planned for DINOForge 1.0. Not yet tested.
Future DINO game version. No compatibility data available yet.

component_compatibility.notes: Confirmed via entity dump. Core health tracking for units and buildings.
Private field, may change in patches. Max health multiplier mutable value.
Zero-sized tag marking entities as units. Verified present on all units.
ArmorType enum. Confirmed layout stable across patches.
Cooldown timer. Also carries fixedProjectileSpeed field.
BlobAssetReference<ProjectileData>. Immutable, verified on projectile entities.
Present on all buildings. Core building data container.
Enemy faction marker (BlobAssetReference<EnemyBaseData>). Player units lack this tag.

game_note: DINO uses Unity 2021.3.45f2. Game updates may change ECS component layouts.
